summary: Sean, a magician, is participating in a test to become a Magician's License holder. He seems confident and has a good score, but his companion is already out of the competition after only 30 minutes. Sean is surprised by this and asks how it happened.
key_moments: The test begins with a seemingly basic 'saving' task
Sean's companion fails to complete the second test within the time limit
Sean is shocked that his companion is already eliminated after only 30 minutes
